citations: friction: one skill cluster timed out at 120s due to slow opus draft call, forcing a re-run
friction: transient api/system errors during the session
pattern: verified generated artifacts against spec
pattern: fixed root cause of the one failing cluster by raising draft-call timeout instead of ignoring it
pattern: cleaned up stale skill folders and temp files
pattern: updated README and refreshed Metabase snapshot to keep docs/data in sync
pattern: grounded claims with concrete evidence from real runs
